readings.summary:
I give you a new commandment, says the Lord:
love one another as I have loved you.

antiphons.text:
I will recount all your wonders,
I will rejoice in you and be glad,
and sing psalms to your name, O Most High.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Jn 11:27
antiphons.text:
Lord, I have come to believe that you are the Christ,
the Son of the living God, who is coming into this world.

gathering.title: Christ in Me Arise
gathering.description: "Be now my footsteps, leading the way..."
